items.title: Earnings To Watch: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Reports Q3 Results Tomorrow
items.description: Paint and coating manufacturer Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) will be reporting earnings this Tuesday before market hours. Here’s what you need to know.

items.title: Big Tech earnings, a crucial Fed meeting, and a Trump-Xi sit-down: What to watch this week
items.description: The market enters the fourth full week of the government shutdown with international trade and domestic rates in focus.
